narrative:
Tallmadge 2-C (precinct in Summit County) has 1,420 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a modest Republican lean of 2.7 percentage points.
